GeneralDescription.SourceString: Sorry, faulty glider deployment isn't covered by your policy.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Sorry, faulty glider deployment isn't covered by your policy.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: This wasteland is getting pretty heated, and if there's one man to profit off of all this chaos, it's The Underwriter! No Sweat Insurance is happy to provide a policy that works for you. And you'd better stay paid up. After all, you wouldn't want to end up like the train...
